text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's time for the Hopeful Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the audience only talks about two particular
Umamusume who have continued to shine after
their debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The buzz is all about Winning Ticket and Biwa
Hayahide, and which of them will win the Satsuki
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin steps up to the racecourse to show
the world her true abilities and make her presence
known.
